name: Vaca Valley Travel Center
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop near the I-80/I-505 interchange (Leisure Town Rd exit) with a Chevron fuel island, diesel lanes, Burger King and Blimpie, driver showers and truck parking.

name: Cordelia Truck Scales (Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Facility)
description: Caltrans/CHP westbound I-80 commercial-vehicle inspection and weigh station southwest of Fairfield with static and dynamic scales, PrePass, and an adjacent rest area/truck parking area; a replacement facility broke ground in 2025.

name: Hunter Hill Rest Area (Westbound)
description: Caltrans westbound I-80 rest area near mile marker 34 (about 2 miles west of Exit 36, American Canyon Rd) east of Vallejo, with restrooms, drinking water, and auto/truck parking.

name: North Bay Truck Center
description: Established commercial heavy-duty truck and trailer repair shop in Fairfield near I-80 offering diagnostics, mechanical repair and tire service.

name: A & T Road Service
description: 24/7 mobile roadside truck, trailer and tire repair service based in Fairfield covering the I-80 corridor.
